mapper.sql: tta.employee_id, tta.title, tta.content, tta.teach_experience, tta.other_experience_compose, tta.my_experience_compose, tta.ever_experience, tta.be_good_at, tta.dept_opinion, tta.dept_by, tta.judge_opinion, tta.judge_by, tta.submit_flag, tta.level, tta.score, tta.file_id, tta.dept_opinion_date, tta.judge_opinion_date, tta.attribute3, tta.id, tta.attribute1, tta.attribute4, tta.attribute5, tta.attribute2, tta.approval_result, tta.oa_order, tta.approval_date, tta.approval_node, tta.approval_employee,tta.create_time, tta.create_by, tta.update_time, tta.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.title as ${tAlias}_title, ${tAlias}.content as ${tAlias}_content, ${tAlias}.teach_experience as ${tAlias}_teach_experience, ${tAlias}.other_experience_compose as ${tAlias}_other_experience_compose, ${tAlias}.my_experience_compose as ${tAlias}_my_experience_compose, ${tAlias}.ever_experience as ${tAlias}_ever_experience, ${tAlias}.be_good_at as ${tAlias}_be_good_at, ${tAlias}.dept_opinion as ${tAlias}_dept_opinion, ${tAlias}.dept_by as ${tAlias}_dept_by, ${tAlias}.judge_opinion as ${tAlias}_judge_opinion, ${tAlias}.judge_by as ${tAlias}_judge_by, ${tAlias}.submit_flag as ${tAlias}_submit_flag, ${tAlias}.level as ${tAlias}_level, ${tAlias}.score as ${tAlias}_score, ${tAlias}.file_id as ${tAlias}_file_id, ${tAlias}.dept_opinion_date as ${tAlias}_dept_opinion_date, ${tAlias}.judge_opinion_date as ${tAlias}_judge_opinion_date, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.approval_result as ${tAlias}_approval_result, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.approval_date as ${tAlias}_approval_date, ${tAlias}.approval_node as ${tAlias}_approval_node, ${tAlias}.approval_employee as ${tAlias}_approval_employee, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,fdev.ext_dept_name AS pe_dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS pe_department, fdev.ext_team_name AS pe_team,
,
,
,
,
from td_teacher_apply tta join pm_employee pe on tta.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 left join tool_local_storage tls on tta.file_id = tls.id left join pm_employee_education pe_pee on pe.id = pe_pee.employee_id and pe_pee.enabled_flag = 1 and pe_pee.new_education_flag = 1 left join pm_employee_entry pe_peen on pe.id = pe_peen.employee_id and pe_peen.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join pm_employee_job pe_pej on pe.id = pe_pej.employee_id and pe_pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pe_pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pe_pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 left outer join fnd_job pe_pej_fj on pe_pej.job_id = pe_pej_fj.id and pe_pej_fj.enabled_flag = 1 and pe_pej_fj.deleted_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into td_teacher_apply (employee_id, title, content, teach_experience, other_experience_compose, my_experience_compose, ever_experience, be_good_at, dept_opinion, dept_by, judge_opinion, judge_by, submit_flag, level, score, file_id, dept_opinion_date, judge_opinion_date, attribute3, attribute1, attribute4, attribute5, attribute2, approval_result, oa_order, approval_date, approval_node, approval_employee, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{pmEmployee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teachExperience,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{otherExperienceCompose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{myExperienceCompose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{everExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beGoodAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptOpinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{judgeOpinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{judgeBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{submitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{score,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{storage.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptOpinionDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{judgeOpinionDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update td_teacher_apply set employee_id = #{pmEmployee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teach_experience = #{teachExperience,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, other_experience_compose = #{otherExperienceCompose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, my_experience_compose = #{myExperienceCompose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ever_experience = #{everExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, be_good_at = #{beGoodAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_opinion = #{deptOpinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_by = #{deptBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, judge_opinion = #{judgeOpinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, judge_by = #{judgeBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, submit_flag = #{submitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, level = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, score = #{score,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, file_id = #{storage.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_opinion_date = #{deptOpinionDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, judge_opinion_date = #{judgeOpinionDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, approval_result = #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oa_order = #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_date = #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, approval_node = #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_employee = #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update td_teacher_apply set level = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, score = #{score,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, file_id = #{storage.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute2 = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update td_teacher_apply set judge_opinion = #{judgeOpinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, judge_by = #{judgeBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, judge_opinion_date = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, approval_date = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, approval_result = #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
